violations.text: Inspector observed standing grey water on the floor (in aisles of facility) and around ring of (employee) restroom. Areas to be thoroghly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2025
The ceiling tiles in the back storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
